# Reliability Checklist: Prerequisite and Documentation Messaging

**Purpose**: Validate requirements quality for deterministic prerequisite output, parseable advisory JSON, true-blocker failure preservation, focused regression coverage, and TACD-004 scope boundaries.
**Created**: 2026-06-19
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Deterministic Output Contract

- [x] CHK001 Is prerequisite capability coverage specified as exactly one advisory result so repeated runs do not create variable provider inventories? [Completeness, Spec FR-001, Spec FR-011, Research Decision 1]
- [x] CHK002 Are output stability and parseability requirements explicit enough for downstream consumers, including JSON-only stdout and stable fields for the changed advisory? [Resolved, Spec FR-013, Spec SC-007, Plan Implementation Approach, Plan PR Review Packet Traceability]
- [ ] CHK003 Are capability categories fixed by the specification rather than discovered dynamically at output time? [Consistency, Spec Clarifications Session 1, Research Decision 2]

## True-Blocker Preservation

- [ ] CHK004 Are true prerequisite or gate failures distinguished from non-blocking capability coverage in both requirements and review evidence? [Consistency, Spec FR-012, Plan PR Review Packet Traceability]
- [x] CHK005 Does the spec preserve actionable failure messaging for existing setup blockers while changing only optional capability coverage? [Resolved, Spec FR-014, Spec SC-008, Plan Implementation Approach, Plan PR Review Packet Traceability]
- [ ] CHK006 Are setup failures required to remain blocking only for true prerequisites or exhausted evidence paths? [Coverage, Spec FR-012, Spec SC-006]

## Focused Regression Coverage

- [ ] CHK007 Is Layer 4 coverage required for the changed advisory name, pass state, absence of per-tool inventory, and missing-optional-capability success path? [Coverage, Spec FR-008, Plan Implementation Approach]
- [ ] CHK008 Are parseability and true-blocker preservation covered by focused deterministic tests rather than broad static enforcement? [Measurability, Spec SC-004, Plan PR Review Packet Traceability]
- [ ] CHK009 Does the quickstart require the same focused verification sequence that the plan names for TACD-003? [Consistency, Plan Testing, Quickstart Verification Commands]

## Deferred Enforcement Boundary

- [ ] CHK010 Are broad named-tool static checks, Layer 5 pointer coverage, and Layer 3 eval expectation rewrites explicitly deferred to TACD-004? [Scope, Spec FR-009, Spec Clarifications Session 3, Roadmap TACD-004]
- [ ] CHK011 Does the plan avoid adding TACD-004 enforcement files or eval fixtures to the TACD-003 declared file operations? [Scope, Plan Declared File Operations, Roadmap TACD-004 Key Files]
- [ ] CHK012 Are generated payload changes constrained to source-backed regeneration rather than direct reliability patching? [Scope, Spec FR-010, Research Decision 4]

## Notes

- Focus areas selected: deterministic and parseable prerequisite output, actionable true-blocker failures, focused advisory regression tests, and no early TACD-004 enforcement logic.
- Depth level: standard reviewer checklist.
- Actor/timing: PR reviewer before task generation or implementation.

## Verification Rerun 2026-06-19

- [x] CHK013 Does the remediated spec promote JSON-only deterministic output and stable advisory fields into a functional requirement and measurable success criterion? [Resolved, Spec FR-013, Spec SC-007]
- [x] CHK014 Does the remediated spec preserve actionable true-blocker setup failures while changing optional capability coverage only? [Resolved, Spec FR-014, Spec SC-008]
- [x] CHK015 Does the remediated plan map JSON parseability and true-blocker preservation to focused Layer 4 evidence without adding TACD-004 static or eval enforcement? [Resolved, Plan Implementation Approach, Plan PR Review Packet Traceability]
